testcase.name: shouldRejectBorrowWhenLimitReached

cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists borrowing_records cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists members cascade Hibernate: create table books ( available_copies integer not null, isbn varchar(13) not null, author varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (isbn) ) Hibernate: create table borrowing_records ( borrow_date date not null, penalty float(53) not null, return_date date, returned boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, book_isbn varchar(13) not null, member_id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table members ( borrowed_books_count integer not null, unpaid_penalties float(53) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, member_id varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (member_id) )
